ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the building is located */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the building is located */,
  "height_m" REAL /* Height of the building in meters */,
  "height_ft" REAL /* Height of the building in feet */,
  "height_px" REAL /* Height of the building in pixels */,
  "floors" INTEGER /* Number of floors in the building */,
  "completion_year" INTEGER /* Year the building was completed */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the main image associated with the building */,
  "building_type" TEXT /* Type of building (e.g., residential, commercial, mixed-use) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the building */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the building (e.g., under construction, completed, planned) */,
  "total_area_sqm" REAL /* Total area of the building in square meters */,
  "total_area_sqft" REAL /* Total area of the building in square feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buildings_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buildings_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country (e.g., Asia, Europe, North America) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area_sqkm" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area_sqkm" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Elevation of the city in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "architects" (
  "architect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each architect */,
  "architect_name" TEXT /* Name of the architect */,
  "firm_name" TEXT /* Name of the architect's firm */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the architect */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the architect */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the architect */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the architect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("architect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engineers" (
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engineer */,
  "engineer_name" TEXT /* Name of the engineer */,
  "firm_name" TEXT /* Name of the engineer's firm */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the engineer */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the engineer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the engineer */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the engineer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engineer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contractors" (
  "contractor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contractor */,
  "contractor_name" TEXT /* Name of the contractor */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the contractor's company */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the contractor */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contractor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_architects" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building */,
  "architect_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the architect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id", "architect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_engineers" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building */,
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the engineer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id", "engineer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_contractors" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building */,
  "contractor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contractor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id", "contractor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "construction_stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each construction stage */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the construction stage */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the construction stage */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the construction stage */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the construction stage (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the construction stage */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the construction stage */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the construction stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_construction_stages_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the image file */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., photo, blueprint, 3D model) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Metadata for the image (e.g., tags, keywords) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, architect, engineer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the building was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
